chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-52 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-06-2025 None present for the petitioner. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w SIP Aijaz Ali, SHO/I.O, P.S, Mithiani. ****** None present for the petitioner though notice of intimation was sent to his counsel for today’s date of hearing. Learned AAG files statements on behalf of respondent No.2 and I.O of the Case, taken on record. I.O is present in person and submits that after due investigation, the Challan has been submitted before the competent Court of law showing accused Ayaz and Huzoor Bux as absconders. Since Challan has been submitted, the trial Court is directed to take all out hectic measures to get the above named absconding accused, nominated in Crime No. 92 of 2024, registered at P.S, Mithani, arrested. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Let copy of this order be communicated to the trial Court for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
